name: Fresh Herbed Oil Paste
recipeIngredient: 2 Large green onions, trimmed, cut into 1-inch lengths
1 Pinch crushed hot red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the garlic, green onions, olive oil, herbs, salt and crushed pepper.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. This paste may be kept refrigerated for up to a week.
4. Brush country bread or boned chicken breasts with the herbed oil paste and grill.
